name: Long Session Coherence
description: Build a TypeScript library with comprehensive test coverage in a long session
goal: Build a TypeScript utility library called 'datakit' from scratch. It must include the following modules with full implementations and tests: (1) src/array.ts — chunk, flatten, unique, groupBy, (2) src/string.ts — truncate, slugify, camelCase, capitalize, (3) src/number.ts — clamp, lerp, roundTo, formatCurrency, (4) src/object.ts — pick, omit, deepMerge, (5) src/date.ts — formatDate, addDays, daysBetween. Each function must have at least 3 test cases. Use Vitest. All tests must pass.
